top3.sql:
WITH sales_2019_2020 AS (
    SELECT 
        s.prod_id,
        t.calendar_month_number,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS amount_sold,
        c.country_iso_code
    FROM sales s
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN customers cust ON s.cust_id = cust.cust_id
    JOIN countries c ON cust.country_id = c.country_id
    WHERE t.calendar_year IN (2019, 2020)
      AND c.country_name = 'France'
      AND s.promo_id IS NOT NULL
      AND s.channel_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY s.prod_id, t.ca...

WITH base_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        s.prod_id,
        t.calendar_month_number,
        t.calendar_year,

    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id

      AND s.promo_id IS NOT NULL
      AND s.channel_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY s.prod_id, t.calendar_m...
